schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents recording agency funding and support of the Bay Coast Railroad through either the Rail Preservation Program or the DRPT's Rail Division. This series includes, but is not limited to: applications, correspondence, agreements, contracts and invoices. This series is inactive as of 3/9/2023.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents recording agency funding and support of the Bay Creej Railroad through either the Rail Preservation Program or the DRPT's Rail Division. This series includes, but is not limited to: applications, correspondence, agreements, contracts and invoices. This series is inactive as of 3/9/2023.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents recording agency funding and support of the Eastern Shore Railroad through either the Rail Preservation Program or the DRPT's Rail Division. This series includes, but is not limited to: applications, correspondence, agreements, contracts and invoices.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: Documents This documents funding requests and applications made to various federal agencies to fund Department of Rail and Public Transportation (DRPT) programs, such as the Federal Railroad Administration (FRA), Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) and Federal Transit Administration (FTA). This series may include but is not limited to: funding requests, applications, project sheets, and approval documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after project completion, Confidential Destruction

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents contractual obligations of the agency for federal funding owed to the grantees. This series may include, but is not limited to: signed contracts, agreements, and grant applications.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after project completion, Confidential Destruction

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of the final Compliance Review Report for all transit and rail grantees. This series may include, but is not limited to: final compliance review reports.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of working papers for all transit and rail grantees. This series may include, but is not limited to: drafts compliance review reports, memoranda, data, or other analyses.

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the receipt and approval/disapproval of applications for state and federal grants for public transportation projects and the department’s oversight of the project. This series may include, but is not limited to: grants, awards, and other financial assistance documents.

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after project completion, Non-confidential Destruction

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the work conducted by the Rail Division of the DRPT, including projects with the Federal Railroad Administration (FRA), local government, and private businesses. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports, memoranda and official forms and letters for specific projects such as Railroad Quiet Zones, abandonment files, and final National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) documents.

retention_rules.disposition: 20 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Rail and Public Transportation

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents various state and federal grant-award programs administered by the DRPT. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications, agreements, contract amendments, and invoices.

retention_rules.disposition: 20 Years after end of calendar year, Confidential Destruction
